articles.title: Cardano's Chang Hard Fork Still Far from 70% Trigger Point
articles.description: Cardano's Chang hard fork held up by slow adoption from exchanges and SPOs, affecting the move to on-chain governance.

articles.description: A crypto whale has been spotted accumulating tens of millions of dollars worth of Ethereum (ETH) in an apparent effort to buy the dip. articles.title: Cardano Price Facing 14% Drop Despite Low Inflation Rate and Network Upgrades
articles.description: Cardano price began consolidating on Saturday after signs of market weakness flashed on the Bitcoin chart. The asset broke down from a bearish setup, showing signs of dropping further. Meanwhile, the Chang upgrade is looming even closer as 79% of nodes have migrated to v9.1.0. articles.title: Tether Denies Celsius' Bitcoin Lawsuit
articles.description: Tether dismisses Celsius' lawsuit over $2.4 billion Bitcoin liquidation, calling it baseless and blaming Celsius for poor financial decisions.
